query:
-- Final Cadia send_ready count
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_sr,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(c.name, ' (', c.company, ' — ', c.roleBucket, ')') ORDER BY c.roleBucket, c.name SEPARATOR '\n') as contacts
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId = 690089
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0;

FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId = 690089
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0;
